description:
You are a Computer User Support Specialist managing the IT help desk. A previously resolved support ticket about 'VPN connection drops intermittently after Windows update' from customer David Kim (david.kim@acmecorp.com) needs to be reopened because the customer reported the issue has recurred. Reopen the conversation and reassign it to Priya Sharma. 

Log in to FreeScout at http://localhost:8080 using:
- Email: admin@helpdesk.local
- Password: Admin123!

metadata.target_subject: VPN connection drops intermittently after Windows update
